lines.speaker: instruction
lines.text: Her budget caps the build: every yen this car's ledger takes counts against {budgetCap}. The payout is {payout}. The difference is yours if you spend well.

lines.speaker: instruction
lines.text: Accept the job when you are ready. There is no deadline; she will wait.

lines.speaker: instruction
lines.text: Open the Local Yard. Every career starts in this room.

lines.speaker: instruction
lines.text: This {model} lists a fault on its sheet. The room prices what it fears. Pay for an inspection and find out if the fear is earned.

lines.speaker: instruction
lines.text: Minor. The discount stays. That gap between what a room fears and what is true is the whole trade.

lines.speaker: instruction
lines.text: Reserve is the seller's floor. Bid it; the room is quiet today.

lines.speaker: instruction
lines.text: Buy-now pays a premium for impatience. Bid instead.

lines.speaker: yuki
lines.text: It has a certain something. Under the dirt.

lines.speaker: instruction
lines.text: Open the service diagram. Point at a section of the car to see inside it; the panel underneath holds the controls.

lines.speaker: instruction
lines.text: Pull the wheel assembly. Taking things off never costs labour, and putting them back exactly as they were is free.

lines.speaker: instruction
lines.text: Her tyres are finished. Buy stock replacements at the parts shop; the budget does not stretch to sport rubber and does not need to.

lines.speaker: instruction
lines.text: Fit the tyres at the bench. Without a tyre machine of your own, the fitting shop's fee rides on the work. Machines you buy make fees disappear.

lines.speaker: instruction
lines.text: The {part} reads worn. Engine work means the engine comes out; without a crane, the machine shop lends its arm for a fee, out and back in.

lines.speaker: yuki
lines.text: My uncle had an engine crane once. He also had a roof. Long story.

lines.speaker: instruction
lines.text: Work costs labour slots, and slots are the day. End the day to let the hours pass.

lines.speaker: instruction
lines.text: Requirements green, ledger under the cap. Deliver it.

lines.speaker: instruction
lines.text: The walkthrough ends here. The rest of the town does not know you yet; the job board fixes that.
